mapper.select: select id, role_name from tb_role order by id

select count(*) from tb_role
and role_name like concat('%', #{roleName}, '%')
select id, role_name as roleName, permissions, default_permissions as defaultPermissions, `desc`, systemic from tb_role where id = #{id}
select id from tb_user where JSON_CONTAINS(role, CAST(#{roleId} as char ))
mapper.delete:
delete from tb_role where id in
#{id}
